name: hold-my-coffee
description: Hold My Coffee — curated skills that make coding agents work like senior engineers and architects.

plugins.name: sdlc
plugins.description: The SDLC handbook: a master map plus nine phase handbooks (brainstorm, task breakdown, build/test, debugging, technical review, QA, product review, scalability/stability, UI/UX) that make an agent work like a battle-scarred senior engineer — evidence over speculation, loud failures, fix causes not symptoms, done means demonstrated.
